mapper.select: SELECT id, code_name, rewards, status, expiration_date, created_at, updated_at FROM gift_code ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'EXPIRED' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, created_at DESC
SELECT id, code_name, rewards, status, expiration_date, created_at, updated_at FROM gift_code WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gift_code (code_name, rewards, status, expiration_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{codeName}, #{rewards}, #{status}, #{expirationDate}, NOW(), NOW())
